summary: Iteration 29 testing complete. All Quick POS PIN Login features verified: (1) PIN Login API works correctly - PIN 1111 returns staff user, PIN 2222 returns restaurant_admin, wrong PIN returns 401, (2) Set/Remove POS PIN APIs require admin auth and validate 4-digit format, (3) Duplicate PIN rejection works, (4) Restaurant-has-pins endpoint returns correct count, (5) Staff list includes has_pos_pin flag, (6) Login page shows Password/Quick PIN toggle after logout, (7) PIN pad shows 4 dots and auto-submits on 4th digit, (8) Role-based navigation works (staff→/pos, admin→/dashboard, platform_owner→/platform/dashboard), (9) Double-tap prevention CSS (touch-action: manipulation) applied to product cards and Place Order button, (10) Settings > User Management shows green PIN badges for staff with PINs.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)
Console warning: IndexedDB getAll error for offline sync - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: PIN Login: auth.py uses bcrypt verify_password to check PIN against pos_pin_hash - secure implementation
Duplicate PIN check: set_pos_pin iterates all restaurant users and verifies PIN uniqueness using bcrypt
PIN pad auto-submit: Login.js submitPin() called when pin.length === 4 in handlePinDigit()
Role-based navigation: navigateByRole() correctly routes platform_owner→/platform/dashboard, admin→/dashboard, user→/pos
Double-tap prevention: POSScreen.js product cards and Place Order button have style={{ touchAction: 'manipulation' }}
useRef guard: addingToCartRef prevents rapid clicks from adding duplicate items (250ms debounce)
last_restaurant_id preservation: AuthContext.logout() saves user.restaurant_id to localStorage before clearing user
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with PINs already set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified Quick POS PIN Login feature: (1) Backend APIs: pin-login, set-pos-pin, remove-pos-pin, restaurant-has-pins all working, (2) Frontend: PIN toggle appears after logout, PIN pad with 4 dots auto-submits, role-based navigation works, (3) Double-tap prevention: touch-action:manipulation CSS + useRef guards on product cards and Place Order button, (4) Settings > User Management shows green PIN badges. PINs set: user=1111, restaurant_admin=2222 on rest_demo_1.

tests: PIN 1111 returns user role with JWT token
PIN 2222 returns admin role with JWT token
Rejects duplicate PIN in same restaurant
Returns has_pins=true and pin_count for rest_demo_1

staff_list_has_pos_pin_flag.evidence: GET /api/restaurant/staff returns has_pos_pin boolean for each user

login_page_pin_toggle.evidence: Password/Quick PIN toggle appears after logout when last_restaurant_id is preserved

pin_pad_ui.evidence: PIN pad shows 4 dots, number keys 0-9, backspace, auto-submits on 4th digit

wrong_pin_error.evidence: Wrong PIN shows 'Invalid PIN' error message

double_tap_prevention.evidence: Product cards and Place Order button have touch-action: manipulation CSS

settings_user_management_pins.evidence: User Management tab shows green PIN badges for staff with PINs, PIN dialog opens correctly

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocked endpoints.
